title: Allahabad High Court directs FIR against Rahul Gandhi in British nationality case
description: The Allahabad High Court on Friday directed the registration of a First Information Report (FIR) against Leader of Opposition Rahul Gandhi in connection with a case alleging that he is a British national holding a UK passport.Single-judge Justice Subhash Vidhyarthi passed the order. The Court found a prima facie case against Gandhi and gave liberty to the State to refer the case to the Central government for its investigation by the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI). Justice Subhash Vidyarth
